meaning: n.古代罗马金币的一种,(表示分数,日期等的)斜线分隔符号(即"/")
examples: The namespace is neither a file nor a directory; whether its URI ends in a solidus is not significant.
The kinetic solidus and liquidus approach to T0 curve with increasing growth velocity on two different isopleths of the alloys.
The generic name stems from the Latin solidus, "whole," probably in allusion to the reported properties of the goldenrods to heal wounds.
One Solidus seedling is Work for Pie, a job-listing Web site for software coders.
